targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(amount_base, amount)), 2) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='income'
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(amount_base, amount)), 2) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='income'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='expense'
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='expense'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base, amount) ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount)) ELSE 0 END)) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base, amount) ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 1) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type IN ('income', 'expense')
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base, amount) ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount)) ELSE 0 END)) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base, amount) ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 1) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type IN ('income', 'expense')

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='expense' AND category_group='Essential'
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='expense' AND category_group='Essential'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='expense' AND category_group='Discretionary'
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='expense' AND category_group='Discretionary'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(1) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='expense'
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(1) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='expense'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND category_group IN (${category_group}) GROUP BY category ORDER BY total DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND category_group IN (${category_group}) GROUP BY category ORDER BY total DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT category_group, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') GROUP BY category_group ORDER BY total DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT category_group, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') GROUP BY category_group ORDER BY total DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT t.category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))), 2) as spent, COALESCE(b.monthly_limit, 0) as budget, CASE WHEN b.monthly_limit > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))) / b.monthly_limit * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END as pct_used, COUNT(1) as count FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN budget_targets b ON t.category = b.category WHERE t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND t.category_group IN (${category_group}) GROUP BY t.category ORDER BY spent DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT t.category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))), 2) as spent, COALESCE(b.monthly_limit, 0) as budget, CASE WHEN b.monthly_limit > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))) / b.monthly_limit * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END as pct_used, COUNT(1) as count FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN budget_targets b ON t.category = b.category WHERE t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND t.category_group IN (${category_group}) GROUP BY t.category ORDER BY spent DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT substr(date,1,7) || '-07' as time, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' GROUP BY substr(date,1,7) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT substr(date,1,7) || '-07' as time, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' GROUP BY substr(date,1,7) ORDER BY time

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT substr(date,1,7) as month, category_group, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND category_group IN ('Essential', 'Discretionary') GROUP BY month, category_group ORDER BY month
targets.queryText: SELECT substr(date,1,7) as month, category_group, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND category_group IN ('Essential', 'Discretionary') GROUP BY month, category_group ORDER BY month

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT substr(date,1,7) as month, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base, amount) ELSE 0 END), 2) as income, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount)) ELSE 0 END), 2) as expenses FROM transactions WHERE tx_type IN ('income', 'expense') GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
targets.queryText: SELECT substr(date,1,7) as month, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base, amount) ELSE 0 END), 2) as income, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount)) ELSE 0 END), 2) as expenses FROM transactions WHERE tx_type IN ('income', 'expense') GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT b.category, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))), 0) / b.monthly_limit * 100, 1) as pct_used FROM budget_targets b LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.category = b.category AND t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 GROUP BY b.category ORDER BY pct_used DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT b.category, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))), 0) / b.monthly_limit * 100, 1) as pct_used FROM budget_targets b LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.category = b.category AND t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 GROUP BY b.category ORDER BY pct_used DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT b.category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))), 2) as spent, b.monthly_limit as budget, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))) - b.monthly_limit, 2) as over_by FROM budget_targets b INNER JOIN transactions t ON t.category = b.category AND t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 GROUP BY b.category HAVING spent > b.monthly_limit ORDER BY over_by DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT b.category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))), 2) as spent, b.monthly_limit as budget, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))) - b.monthly_limit, 2) as over_by FROM budget_targets b INNER JOIN transactions t ON t.category = b.category AND t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 GROUP BY b.category HAVING spent > b.monthly_limit ORDER BY over_by DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT date, description, amount, currency, ROUND(COALESCE(amount_base, amount), 2) as amount_base, tx_type, category_group, category FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type IN (${tx_type}) AND category_group IN (${category_group}) AND category IN (${category}) ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 200
targets.queryText: SELECT date, description, amount, currency, ROUND(COALESCE(amount_base, amount), 2) as amount_base, tx_type, category_group, category FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type IN (${tx_type}) AND category_group IN (${category_group}) AND category IN (${category}) ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 200

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT currency, ROUND(SUM(ABS(amount)), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') GROUP BY currency ORDER BY total DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT currency, ROUND(SUM(ABS(amount)), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') GROUP BY currency ORDER BY total DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='investment' GROUP BY category ORDER BY total DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='investment' GROUP BY category ORDER BY total DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT month || '-01' as time, from_currency || '/' || to_currency as pair, rate FROM exchange_rates ORDER BY month
targets.queryText: SELECT month || '-01' as time, from_currency || '/' || to_currency as pair, rate FROM exchange_rates ORDER BY month

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT b.category, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))), 0) / MAX(1, julianday('now') - julianday('${cycle}-07')) * 30 / b.monthly_limit * 100, 1) as projected_pct FROM budget_targets b LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.category = b.category AND t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 GROUP BY b.category ORDER BY projected_pct DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT b.category, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))), 0) / MAX(1, julianday('now') - julianday('${cycle}-07')) * 30 / b.monthly_limit * 100, 1) as projected_pct FROM budget_targets b LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.category = b.category AND t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 GROUP BY b.category ORDER BY projected_pct DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT b.category, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))), 0), 2) as current_spend, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))), 0) / MAX(1, julianday('now') - julianday('${cycle}-07')) * 30, 2) as projected_spend, b.monthly_limit as budget, ROUND(b.monthly_limit - COALESCE(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))), 0) / MAX(1, julianday('now') - julianday('${cycle}-07')) * 30, 2) as projected_surplus FROM budget_targets b LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.category = b.category AND t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 GROUP BY b.category ORDER BY projected_surplus
targets.queryText: SELECT b.category, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))), 0), 2) as current_spend, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))), 0) / MAX(1, julianday('now') - julianday('${cycle}-07')) * 30, 2) as projected_spend, b.monthly_limit as budget, ROUND(b.monthly_limit - COALESCE(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))), 0) / MAX(1, julianday('now') - julianday('${cycle}-07')) * 30, 2) as projected_surplus FROM budget_targets b LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.category = b.category AND t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 GROUP BY b.category ORDER BY projected_surplus

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(savings), 2) as value FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-6 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(savings), 2) as value FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-6 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(savings) * 6, 2) as value FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-6 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(savings) * 6, 2) as value FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-6 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(savings) * 12, 2) as value FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(savings) * 12, 2) as value FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT substr(date,1,7) as month, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END), 2) as savings FROM transactions WHERE tx_type IN ('income','expense') AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
targets.queryText: SELECT substr(date,1,7) as month, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END), 2) as savings FROM transactions WHERE tx_type IN ('income','expense') AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(amount_base, amount)), 2) as value FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='investment'
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(amount_base, amount)), 2) as value FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='investment'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT h.asset_type, h.symbol, h.quantity, COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0) as price_pln, ROUND(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0), 2) as value_pln, h.source, h.updated_at FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol ORDER BY value_pln DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT h.asset_type, h.symbol, h.quantity, COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0) as price_pln, ROUND(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0), 2) as value_pln, h.source, h.updated_at FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol ORDER BY value_pln DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)) FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), 0) / ${fire_target} * 100, 1) as value
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)) FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), 0) / ${fire_target} * 100, 1) as value

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN avg_monthly_savings > 0 THEN CAST(ROUND((${fire_target} - current_value) / avg_monthly_savings, 0) AS INTEGER) ELSE -1 END as value FROM (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)) FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), 0) as current_value, COALESCE((SELECT AVG(savings) FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)), 0) as avg_monthly_savings)
targets.queryText: SELECT CASE WHEN avg_monthly_savings > 0 THEN CAST(ROUND((${fire_target} - current_value) / avg_monthly_savings, 0) AS INTEGER) ELSE -1 END as value FROM (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)) FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), 0) as current_value, COALESCE((SELECT AVG(savings) FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)), 0) as avg_monthly_savings)

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT 'Current Portfolio' as scenario, ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)) FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), 0), 0) as value UNION ALL SELECT 'Target (FIRE)', ${fire_target} UNION ALL SELECT 'Avg Monthly Savings', ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT AVG(savings) FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)), 0), 0)
targets.queryText: SELECT 'Current Portfolio' as scenario, ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)) FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), 0), 0) as value UNION ALL SELECT 'Target (FIRE)', ${fire_target} UNION ALL SELECT 'Avg Monthly Savings', ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT AVG(savings) FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)), 0), 0)

options.content:
### Vaultkeeper Commands

**Budget check:**
> "How am I doing on budget this cycle?"

**Reclassify:**
> "Reclassify all Zabka transactions to Groceries/Essential"

**Show unknowns:**
> "Show me unclassified transactions"

**Monthly report:**
> "Generate report for cycle 2026-02"

**Set budget:**
> "Set Dining budget to 500 PLN"

---
*Talk to Vaultkeeper in Matrix to manage finances.*

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT 'Total Transactions' as metric, CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) as value FROM transactions UNION ALL SELECT 'Unclassified (Other)', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM transactions WHERE category = 'Other' AND tx_type = 'expense' UNION ALL SELECT 'Unknown tx_type', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM transactions WHERE tx_type = 'unknown' UNION ALL SELECT 'Missing amount_base', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM transactions WHERE amount_base IS NULL AND currency != 'PLN' UNION ALL SELECT 'Date Range', MIN(date) || ' to ' || MAX(date) FROM transactions UNION ALL SELECT 'Last Transaction', MAX(date) FROM transactions UNION ALL SELECT 'Exchange Rate Months', CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT month) AS TEXT) FROM exchange_rates UNION ALL SELECT 'Budget Targets', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM budget_targets UNION ALL SELECT 'Holdings Tracked', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM holdings
targets.queryText: SELECT 'Total Transactions' as metric, CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) as value FROM transactions UNION ALL SELECT 'Unclassified (Other)', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM transactions WHERE category = 'Other' AND tx_type = 'expense' UNION ALL SELECT 'Unknown tx_type', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM transactions WHERE tx_type = 'unknown' UNION ALL SELECT 'Missing amount_base', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM transactions WHERE amount_base IS NULL AND currency != 'PLN' UNION ALL SELECT 'Date Range', MIN(date) || ' to ' || MAX(date) FROM transactions UNION ALL SELECT 'Last Transaction', MAX(date) FROM transactions UNION ALL SELECT 'Exchange Rate Months', CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT month) AS TEXT) FROM exchange_rates UNION ALL SELECT 'Budget Targets', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM budget_targets UNION ALL SELECT 'Holdings Tracked', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM holdings
